entities.name: PHAEOISARIOPSIS PERSONATA
entities.description: A fungal pathogen that develops on groundnut plants and whose conidial morphology is affected by relative humidity.

entities.name: MYCOSPHAERELLA BERKELEYI
entities.description: An alternative scientific name for the fungus Phaeoisariopsis personata.

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The agricultural host plant on which Phaeoisariopsis personata develops.

entities.name: RELATIVE HUMIDITY
entities.description: The environmental moisture level that significantly influences the length and septation of conidia.

entities.name: CONIDIAL MORPHOLOGY
entities.description: The overall physical characteristics of the conidia of P. personata, including length and septa.

entities.name: CONIDIAL LENGTH
entities.description: The specific measurement of the length of the conidia, which varies based on relative humidity.

entities.name: NUMBER OF SEPTA
entities.description: The count of septa within the conidia, which varies based on relative humidity.

entities.name: MICROSCOPIC EXAMINATION
entities.description: The analytical technique used to observe and measure the conidial characteristics of P. personata.
